title: Will CPI exceed 3% in March?
description: Sample market about whether the March consumer price index year-over-year reading is above 3%.
rules: This fictional market resolves based on a publicly released CPI report for March.
notes: Example only; not live market data.

title: Federal Reserve rate decision in June
description: Sample market tracking whether the Federal Reserve raises, holds, or cuts the federal funds target range at a June meeting.
rules: This fictional market resolves from the announced policy decision.

title: Presidential approval polling above 50%
description: Sample market about whether a national polling average reports presidential approval above 50%.
rules: This fictional market resolves using a named polling-average snapshot on the close date.
notes: Fictional data for an interview project.

title: Unemployment rate below 4%
description: Sample market about whether the monthly unemployment rate is reported below 4%.
rules: This fictional market resolves from a labor report release.
notes: No investment or trading advice implied.

title: WTI oil closes above 90 dollars
description: Sample market on whether a referenced oil benchmark closes above a threshold.
rules: This fictional market resolves based on a closing price from a reference publisher.
notes: The threshold and dates are sample values.

title: New York rainfall exceeds two inches
description: Sample market about whether measured rainfall in New York City exceeds two inches during a weekend.
rules: This fictional market resolves from an official weather station measurement.
notes: Weather event example for retrieval variety.

title: Animated movie opens above 100 million
description: Sample market about whether a fictional animated movie exceeds 100 million dollars in domestic opening weekend box office.
rules: This fictional market resolves from a box office reporting estimate.

title: Metro City wins the soccer championship
description: Sample market tracking whether a fictional Metro City soccer club wins a championship final.
rules: This fictional market resolves from the official match result after regulation, extra time, or penalties.

title: US GDP growth above 2%
description: Sample market about whether a quarterly GDP growth estimate is above 2%.
rules: This fictional market resolves from a scheduled economic release.

title: Election turnout exceeds 60%
description: Sample market about whether turnout in a fictional statewide election exceeds 60% of registered voters.
rules: This fictional market resolves from certified election turnout results.
